tool_contracts.discovery: Every src/tool_manifest.zig entry is registered through src/server.zig and must pass tools/list schema checks.
tool_contracts.invalid_input: Every public tool must return structured argument_error content for an unknown argument before handler execution.
tool_contracts.writes_source: Source-writing tools must expose an apply gate.
tool_contracts.backend_or_artifact: Backend and artifact tools must have a non-empty plan so release-check can name missing coverage by tool.
